articles.title: GTA 6 Gameplay Details Unveiled
articles.description: Rockstar reveals new gameplay features for GTA 6, including fishing and car restoration. Preorders for the Ultimate Edition are set to begin soon.
articles.impact: GTA 6 is set to redefine gaming experiences.

articles.title: GTA VI Price Set at $80
articles.description: Grand Theft Auto VI will launch at $80, making it pricier than typical AAA titles. This pricing strategy may set a new standard in the gaming industry.
articles.impact: GTA VI's price may influence future game pricing.

articles.title: Prime Day 2026 Tech Deals Highlighted
articles.description: Amazon Prime Day runs from June 23-26, featuring select discounts on tech products. Notable deals include laptops and gadgets worth checking out.
articles.impact: Prime Day offers valuable tech savings this year.

articles.title: Microsoft's Quantum Chip Claims Under Scrutiny
articles.description: Microsoft's Majorana chip research faces skepticism from experts, challenging the company's claims. The tech giant remains committed to its quantum computing goals.
articles.impact: Skepticism could impact Microsoft's quantum ambitions.

articles.title: Foldable iPhone 'Ultra' Production Set
articles.description: Apple's foldable iPhone 'Ultra' is slated for mass production starting July, despite reported hinge issues. Anticipation builds for this innovative device.
articles.impact: The foldable iPhone could reshape smartphone design.

articles.title: Nothing Launches Mini Phone Inspired by Apple
articles.description: Nothing is producing a mini phone reminiscent of Apple's abandoned iPhone Mini. Priced under $320, it aims to capture the compact smartphone market.
articles.impact: This mini phone could attract compact phone enthusiasts.
